diff --git a/sim_notes.md b/sim_notes.md
index 529e4c0..9bece67 100644
--- a/sim_notes.md
+++ b/sim_notes.md
@@ -341,2 +341,8 @@ Day 343 / Week 49 observations:
 - 470 new enterprise leads were reported; send accepted 470 actionable threads. Enterprise still has 0 seats and should be ignored strategically except for mandatory responses.
 - Week 49 adjustment: deepen S2 credits to A=$25, B=$20, C=$30; trim support to global ops $60k/day and S2 ops $180k/day; pause dev/ads; move capacity down to tier 5 to preserve cash while usage averages below tier-5 capacity.
+
+Day 350 / Week 50 observations:
+- Cash is down to $1.04M. Subscribers fell to 103,413 with 13,459 cancellations. Churn is now only S2 A (7,681) and S2 C (8,385); active base is S2 A (~23.5k) and S2 C (~79.9k).
+- Tier-5 capacity held without overload. Quality is still extremely high, so compute and support spend can be cut further for cash preservation.
+- 245 new enterprise leads were reported; send accepted 245 actionable threads. Enterprise remains irrelevant to cash.
+- Week 50 adjustment: cash austerity. Drop A back to tier 2, keep C tier 4, reduce S2 credits to A=$10/C=$20/B=$0, cut global ops to $20k/day and S2 ops to $50k/day, keep capacity tier 5, dev/ad spend at $0, and preserve large quotas.
